subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed from the Kingdom of Utterance, confirming the Torah and the Gospel and the Qur'án [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن من فی ملکوت البیان مصدقا للتوراة و الانجیل و الفرقان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures
